question: What is the main idea of the talk?

question: According to the talk, what do high power poses do?
answer_en: Increase testosterone and decrease cortisol
answer_zh: 提高睪固酮並降低皮質醇
answer_ja: テストステロンを増やしコルチゾールを減らす

question: What is the effect of low power poses on hormone levels?
answer_en: ecrease testosterone and increase cortisol

answer_ja: テストステロンを減らしコルチゾールを増やす

question: What does the speaker mean by 'fake it till you become it'?

answer_en: ct powerful until you truly feel powerful
answer_zh: 假裝有力量直到真正感覺到力量

question: Why do people tend to make themselves smaller when feeling powerless?
answer_en: To avoid bumping into others
answer_ja: 他人にぶつからないようにするため

They have no impact on behavior

It is a gesture of apology

question: What did the experiment involving job interviews show?
options: High power posing improved interview evaluations
Low power posing improved interview evaluations
Posing had no effect on interviews
Interview content was the only factor

ecause it is a secret technique

oth genders pose the same way
